assumptions: The issue concerns the initial recognition of the shareholder loan as a financial instrument.
The request is limited to initial recognition and measurement, including any difference between transaction price and fair value.

approaches.label: Initial recognition at transaction price
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 B5.1.1 states that the fair value of a financial instrument at initial recognition is normally the transaction price.

approaches.label: Initial recognition at fair value
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 B5.1.1–B5.1.2 include initial measurement at fair value when the consideration is for more than the instrument itself, and illustrate discounting future cash flows for a non-interest-bearing or off-market loan.

approaches.label: Immediate day-one gain or loss
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 B5.1.2A(a) requires immediate recognition in profit or loss of the difference between fair value and transaction price when fair value is evidenced by Level 1 inputs or a valuation technique using only observable market data.

approaches.label: Deferred day-one difference
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 B5.1.2A(b) requires the initial difference between fair value and transaction price to be deferred when the fair value is not evidenced by Level 1 inputs or a valuation technique using only observable market data.
